dsl_rule.translation_notes: Interpreted as a three-moving-average crossover system using EMA (faster-responding than SMA for trend-following). Fast=EMA5, Medium=EMA20, Slow=EMA100. The source text emphasizes the confirming third MA should be equal to or faster than the fastest trend, so EMA100 serves as confirmation level. Exit conditions default to reversal of the fast/medium crossover per Rule 8.

source_rule_text: Use a moving average crossover system to generate trend-following signals.
